news.headline: Makin Wellness ranked 71 on Inc.'s 2025 list of fastest-growing companies in Northeast, providing online therapy with top specialists.
news.summary: Pittsburgh-based Makin Wellness has been recognized by Inc. magazine for its rapid growth as a premier provider of secure online therapy and counseling services. Known for offering a safe and supportive environment, Makin Wellness employs top-rated specialists and a results-driven approach. The company has been named one of the fastest-growing private companies in the industry, solidifying its position as a leader in the field. The accolade comes amidst their dedication to providing quality care to a growing number of clients, showcasing their commitment to excellence and innovation in mental health services.

news.headline: Rocket Lab will release its financial results for Q1 2025 on May 8, 2025, with a conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT.
news.summary: In Long Beach, California, Rocket Lab USA, Inc. declared that it would disclose its financial results for the initial quarter of 2025 after the U.S. markets' closing on Thursday, May 8, 2025. The Company, a prominent figure in launch services and space systems globally, is set to conduct a conference call at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time). The event will offer a live webcast and a replay option on the Company’s Investor Relations platform.

news.headline: Fortive (NYSE: FTV) declares $0.08 per share quarterly dividend on common stock, payable on June 27, 2025.
news.summary: In Everett, Washington, Fortive Corporation declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per share for its common stock, with a par value of $0.01 per share. This dividend is set to be paid on June 27, 2025, to common stockholders recorded as of May 30, 2025. While Fortive plans to continue issuing quarterly dividends, specifics regarding future dividends, such as amounts, record dates, and payment dates, will be determined and announced separately.

news.headline: Wabash schedules Q1 2025 earnings conference call on April 30, 2025, at 12:00 p.m. ET. Access via website or dialing (800) 715-9871 with conference ID 9986205.

This event, along with a slide presentation, can be accessed through the "Investors" section on Wabash's website, www.onewabash.com, under "Events & Presentations." To join the conference call, participants can dial (800) 715-9871 with the conference ID 9986205. A replay of the call will be made available shortly after.

news.headline: Trump: I would consider deal where China approves TikTok sale in exchange for tariff relief.

news.headline: ProPetro to discuss Q1 2025 earnings on upcoming call.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the number of coronavirus cases worldwide has reached over 200 million, with the global death toll surpassing 4 million. The United States continues to lead in both cases and deaths, with over 35 million confirmed cases and 600,000 deaths. In efforts to curb the spread of the virus, various countries have been ramping up their vaccination campaigns, administering over 3.5 billion doses globally. Despite vaccination efforts, concerns remain about new variants and the effectiveness of vaccines against them. Governments are urging continued vigilance and adherence to safety measures to protect public health.

news.headline: Imperial Oil to hold 2025 Investor Day on April 17 with top executives presenting at 9am EST via webcast.

During the event, the management team will offer insights on the company's operations and strategic direction, followed by a Q&A session.

news.headline: Trump asked about tariffs and market response: Operation over, now it settles in.
CN set new monthly records in March, moving 2.85M metric tonnes of grain from Western Canada & 2.98M metric tonnes nationally.
news.summary: Today, CN (TSX: CNR) (NYSE: CNI) revealed that it has broken new records by transporting over 2.85 million metric tonnes of grain from Western Canada and 2.98 million metric tonnes nationwide in the month of April. This feat was accomplished through collaborative efforts with customers to address challenges posed by severe cold weather conditions in Western Canada earlier in the year, leading to safety-related train length restrictions.

news.headline: Theratechnologies to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 9 at 8:30 am ET.

The announcement is scheduled for April 9, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: XRP stabilizes at $2 support level in marketwide sell-off, potential 73% gain as chart pattern suggests breakout. RLUSD integration by Ripple to boost XRP price and liquidity. RLUSD market cap at $244 million indicates growth potential. Analysts eye $3.50+ target for XRP. Symmetrical triangle pattern points to $3.51 with potential 73% gain. Positive sentiment and strong technicals support bullish outlook for XRP. Do your own research before investing.
news.summary: XRP stabilized near $2 support after a market sell-off, showing early signs of a bullish breakout. Ripple’s RLUSD integration into its cross-border payments system could boost XRP price significantly. RLUSD market cap is $244 million with 87% growth in March. Positive sentiment may push XRP to $3.50+. XRP forms a triangle pattern indicating a possible recovery to $3.51, a 73% gain. Analysts predict a bullish outlook for XRP due to adoption and technical factors, with targets ranging from $5 to $18 in the medium to long term. RSI signals a price bottom and a potential upside target of $3.80.

news.headline: OPEC Plus raises oil output after Trump's tariffs, causing prices to drop sharply in the market.
news.summary: The OPEC Plus group, including Saudi Arabia, have intensified efforts to increase oil supply, leading to a significant drop in prices.

news.headline: S&P 500 drops nearly 5% Thursday, worst slump since June 2020, due to trade war fears from higher tariffs.
news.summary: On Thursday, the S&P 500 experienced a significant drop of nearly 5%, marking its sharpest decline since June 2020. This decline was triggered by President Trump's announcement of tariffs that exceeded expectations, sparking renewed economic concerns.

news.headline: 2025 Top 50 Technologies project a $1.8 trillion sector, showing growth opportunities in various industries.
news.summary: New technologies are reshaping industries, presenting significant growth prospects. On April 3, 2025, Frost & Sullivan released its 15th edition of "2025 Top 50 Technologies," showcasing 50 crucial advancements with promising opportunities. This analysis underscores the potential for industries to leverage these innovations for growth and development.

Global cancer research symposium in NYC hosted by The Mark Foundation brought together 150 scientists from 13 states & 7 countries to share breakthroughs.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, The Mark Foundation for Cancer Research brought together over 150 scientists from 13 states and seven countries in New York City for its 2025 Scientific Symposium. This gathering served as a vital platform for the Foundation's grantees to collaborate and exchange ideas.

This approach focuses on identifying software companies with advanced monetization structures and innovative technology solutions. Noteworthy investors in their latest fund round include...

news.headline: Trivest partners with Sentinel Dock & Door Solutions, merging 3 regional providers in Canada for growth, who appoint Travis Allan as CEO.
news.summary: Miami-based private equity firm Trivest Partners has recently established Sentinel Dock & Door Solutions, a prominent network of commercial dock and door service providers in Canada. This new venture combines three top regional service providers into one unified platform, positioning them for further expansion. Alongside this launch, Trivest has appointed Travis Allan as the new Chief Executive Officer of Sentinel.

news.headline: Natural Gas Services Group appoints Anthony Gallegos to Board of Directors, filling vacancy by David Bradshaw retires in Dec.
news.summary: In Midland, Texas, on April 3, 2025, Natural Gas Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: NGS), a prominent supplier of natural gas compression equipment and services in the energy sector, revealed the appointment of Anthony Gallegos to its Board of Directors. Gallegos assumes the role previously held by David Bradshaw following his retirement from the Board in December 2024. This strategic decision was made on April 1, 2025, marking a significant change within the company's leadership.

news.headline: Equifax to release Q1 2025 results on April 22 at 6:30 a.m. ET, followed by conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.

news.headline: Guess?, Inc. (NYSE: GES) reports 5% revenue growth in USD and 9% in constant currency in Q4 2025. CEO cites rag & bone acquisition as key driver.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Guess?, Inc. (NYSE: GES) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ending on February 1, 2025. CEO Carlos Alberini noted a 5% revenue growth in U.S. dollars and a 9% growth in constant currency during the fourth quarter. The increase was mainly attributed to the rag & bone acquisition, alongside strong performance in wholesale operations in Europe and the Americas, and expanded licensing opportunities.

news.headline: Guess? Inc. has appointed Alberto Toni as CFO, replacing Dennis Secor. Toni is currently CFO of Flos B&B Italia Group.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Guess?, Inc. (NYSE: GES) revealed that Alberto Toni, the current Group Managing Director and CFO of Flos B&B Italia Group S.p.A., will take on the role of CFO of Guess? following the completion of the Company’s next Quarterly Report, due around mid-June. Alberto Toni will replace Dennis Secor, the Interim CFO, who will continue as Executive Vice President at the Company until September.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices drop on tariff news; Bitcoin $82,025.41 (-5.1%), Ethereum $1,785.61 (-6.5%), Solana $115.31 (-11.7%). Trading lower due to decline in financial markets.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are experiencing a downturn today as traditional financial markets also see declines. Some of the top cryptocurrencies are facing losses, with Bitcoin dropping by 5.1% to $82,025.41, Ethereum down 6.5% at $1,785.61, Solana decreasing by 11.7% to $115.31, XRP falling 4.6% to $2.05, Dogecoin losing 8.5% at $0.1587, and Shiba Inu down 3.6% to $0.00001221.Important statistics reveal a 7.5% increase in large transaction volume and a 6% decline in daily active addresses. The number of transactions over $100,000 has decreased from 10,387 to 10,152 in a day, while exchange netflows have risen by 19.4%. Additionally, 194,417 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, resulting in losses totaling $527.37 million.In recent developments, experts are considering Bitcoin as a feasible global reserve asset, while JPMorgan notes gold surpassing Bitcoin in inflation hedge strategy. Overall, since the beginning of 2025, Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP have seen declines. For further details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Fortive to host Q1 2025 earnings conference call on May 1, 2025 at 12:00 p.m. ET, lasting about 1 hour. Website: www.fortive.com.
news.summary: Fortive Corporation (NYSE: FTV) revealed it will broadcast their first quarter 2025 earnings conference call on May 1, 2025, at 12:00 p.m. ET, lasting around 1 hour. The conference call and slide presentation will be accessible on the "Investors" segment of Fortive’s website, www.fortive.com, under "Events/Presentations." Following the call, a replay will be posted on the same website section.

news.headline: Impinj set to reveal Q1 2025 financial results.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 3.9%, marking a 0.2% decrease from last month. The total number of jobs added in various sectors reached 250,000, surpassing market expectations. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter was reported at 5.2%, showing a significant improvement from the previous year. Experts attribute this positive economic trend to increased consumer spending and investments in infrastructure projects. The stock market also saw a boost, with the main index rising by 2.5% in response to these developments. Overall, the data indicates a strengthening economy and positive outlook for the upcoming months.

news.headline: Astronics provides advanced frequency converter for NASA-Boeing X-66 Demonstrator Aircraft.
news.summary: In East Aurora, New York, Astronics Corporation (Nasdaq: ATRO) has been selected to supply an advanced frequency converter for the NASA-Boeing X-66 Demonstrator Aircraft.

news.headline: Procurant introduces tariff charge management feature for grocery buyers, aiding in tracking and managing import tariffs within their purchase orders and invoices. Now buyers can set up and manage tariff charge rules.
news.summary: Procurant, a software solutions provider for the food and retail sector, unveiled a new feature in its Procurant Commerce platform in Watsonville, Calif. The update allows retail grocery buyers to efficiently handle tariff-related fees. Through this enhancement, users can now easily monitor, control, and generate reports on import tariffs associated with their orders and invoices. Specifically, Procurant buyers can establish and adjust tariff charge regulations and implement tariff rates during their purchasing process. This development equips retail grocery buyers with advanced capabilities to manage tariff-related expenses effectively.
